Loan Analyser - Free EMI Calculator & Pre-Payment Planner

11→

12→ Loan Analyser is a free online tool to calculate your EMI, plan pre-payments, and discover 13→ how much interest you can save on your home loan, personal loan, or car loan. Built for 14→ Indian borrowers. 15→

16→

Features

17→
    18→
  • EMI Calculator - Enter principal, interest rate, and tenure to get monthly EMI
    • 19→
  • Pre-Payment Planner - Add lump sum payments and see interest savings instantly
    • 20→
  • Amortization Schedule - Month-by-month breakdown of principal and interest
    • 21→
  • What-If Simulator - Plan future pre-payments and compare scenarios
    • 22→
  • Rate Change Tracker - Track bank rate revisions and see updated schedules
    • 23→
  • Smart Recommendations - AI-powered strategies to minimise your loan cost
    • 24→
  • Visual Charts - Balance curves, payment breakup, cumulative interest graphs
    • 25→
26→

How to use

27→

28→ Enter your loan details including principal amount, annual interest rate, monthly EMI, and 29→ start date. Add any pre-payments you have made or plan to make. The tool instantly 30→ calculates your revised amortization schedule, interest saved, months reduced, and new 31→ closure date. 32→

33→

Frequently Asked Questions

34→

How much can I save with pre-payments?

35→

36→ Even small pre-payments can save lakhs in interest over the loan tenure. Use our 37→ calculator to see the exact savings for your loan. 38→

39→

Does this work for home loans, car loans, and personal loans?

40→

41→ Yes. Loan Analyser works for any reducing balance EMI-based loan including home loans, car 42→ loans, personal loans, and education loans. 43→

44→

Is this tool free?

45→

Yes, Loan Analyser is completely free to use with no sign-up required.

content.text:
Build successful. Here's a summary of all changes made:

### Charts - Responsive & UI/UX Improvements (all 6 charts)
- **Adaptive height**: 260px on mobile vs 350px on desktop (240px for PieChart mobile)
- **Compact Y-axis**: Uses `formatCurrencyShort` (e.g., "10.5L", "1.2Cr", "50K") instead of full `₹10,00,000` — saves ~40% horizontal space
- **Reduced Y-axis width**: 45-55px on mobile vs 80px on desktop
- **Smaller font sizes**: 10px on mobile vs 12px on desktop for axis ticks
- **Shorter legend names**: "Original", "Actual", "Simulated" instead of "Original Schedule", "Actual (with adjustments)", "Simulated (what-if)"
- **Better tooltips**: Rounded corners, subtle shadow, consistent styling
- **Softer grid lines**: `#f1f5f9` for less visual noise
- **Responsive padding**: `p-4 sm:p-6` on chart containers
- **PieChart donut style**: Added `innerRadius` for modern donut look, responsive `outerRadius` (85px mobile vs 130px desktop)
- **YearlySummary**: Abbreviated year labels on mobile (`'24` instead of `2024`)
- **Bar charts**: Added rounded top corners for modern look

### Layout & Spacing
- **Main content**: Tighter padding (`px-3`, `py-5`, `space-y-5`) on mobile
- **Chart grids**: `gap-4` on mobile, `gap-6` on desktop
- **Tab buttons**: Reduced padding on mobile
- **Section panels**: `px-4 py-4` on mobile, `px-6 py-5` on desktop

### Forms - Mobile Full-Width
- **PrePaymentForm, RateChangeForm, WhatIfSimulator**: Changed from `flex flex-wrap` to `grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_auto]` — inputs stack vertically on mobile, align horizontally on desktop
- **Input widths**: Added `w-full` so inputs fill the grid cell

### Touch Device Fixes
- **Edit/Delete buttons**: Changed `opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100` to `sm:opacity-0 sm:group-hover:opacity-100` — always visible on mobile (no hover on touch)

### Summary Cards
- **2-column grid on mobile** (was 1-column), 4-column on desktop
- **Compact sizing**: Smaller padding, icons, and font sizes on mobile
- **Truncated sub-text**: Prevents overflow on small screens

### Simulation Banner
- **Stacks vertically on mobile** with shorter text (hides "Charts reflect..." on mobile)
